## Summary

What does this change and why?

## Related issues

Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check src tests` passes
- [ ] `pyright` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes (added/updated tests for the change)
- [ ] Updated `README.md` **and** `README.en.md` if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No large binaries committed (fonts other than `HaranoAjiGothic-Medium.otf`)

## Notes for reviewers

Anything worth calling out — trade-offs, follow-ups, or areas needing a closer look.
